data.title: Add REPLAN_RESOLVED: brainstorm instruction to sprint cascade success paths
data.description: The sprint SKILL.md brainstorm cascade success paths (Phase 2 d-replan-collect option (a) and Phase 7 step 2a option (a)) do not write REPLAN_RESOLVED: brainstorm after cascade completes. Contract requires it (replan-observability.md). Add ticket comment instruction at cascade exit in both locations. File Impact: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (modify).
